| Name | Description |
| --- | --- |
| gridActivePowerW | The active power at the grid point. |
| gridReactivePowerVar | The reactive power at the grid point. |
| storageSOC% | The state of charge of an energy storage system, expressed as a percentage of its total capacity. |
| inverterPhaseAActivePowerW | The active power in phase A. |
| inverterPhaseBActivePowerW | The active power in phase B. |
| inverterPhaseCActivePowerW | The active power in phase C. |
| inverterPhaseAReactivePowerVar | The reactive power in phase A. |
| inverterPhaseBReactivePowerVar | The reactive power in phase B. |
| inverterPhaseCReactivePowerVar | The reactive power in phase C. |
| inverterActivePowerW | The total active power output of all inverter. |
| inverterReactivePowerVar | The total reactive power output of all inverter. |
| pvPowerW | The total power output of the photovoltaic (PV) system. |
| storageChargeDischargePowerW | The total power capacity of the energy storage system, where charging is represented as positive and discharging as negative. |
| gridPhaseAActivePowerW | The active power in phase A at the grid connection point. |
| gridPhaseBActivePowerW | The active power in phase B at the grid connection point. |
| gridPhaseCActivePowerW | The active power in phase C at the grid connection point. |
| gridPhaseAReactivePowerVar | The reactive power in phase A at the grid connection point. |
| gridPhaseBReactivePowerVar | The reactive power in phase B at the grid connection point. |
| gridPhaseCReactivePowerVar | The reactive power in phase C at the grid connection point. |
| storageChargeCapacityWh | The amount of energy that an energy storage system can be charged with. |
| storageDischargeCapacityWh | The amount of energy that an energy storage system can discharge. |
| batteryMaxChargePowerW | The maximum power all system batteries can collectively receive during charging. |
| batteryMaxDischargePowerW | The maximum power all system batteries can collectively deliver during discharging. |
| inverterMaxFeedInActivePowerW | The combined maximum active power capacity of all inverters within the system. |
| inverterMaxAbsorptionActivePowerW | The total active power absorption capacity of all inverters within the system. |
| inverterMaxFeedInReactivePowerVar | The maximum reactive power that all inverters in the system can collectively feed into the system. |
| inverterMaxAbsorptionReactivePowerVar | The total reactive power absorption capacity of all inverters within the system.
